passive.name: Determination
passive.description: Every third attack deals bonus damage and heals Xin Zhao.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Xin Zhao}} [[basic attack]]s and ''{{ai|Wind Becomes Lightning|Xin Zhao}}'' strikes generate a stack of ''Determination'', stacking up to 3 times.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Upon generating the final atack, '''Xin Zhao''' consumes them to {{tip|heal}} himself and deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Xin Zhao's''' [[basic attack]]s and ''{{ai|Wind Becomes Lightning|Xin Zhao}}'' strikes generate a [[stack]] of ''Determination'', stacking up to 3 times. The third stack consumes them all to deal {{as|{{pp|15 to 60 for 4|key=%|1 to 16|formula=15% + 15% every 5 levels}} AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} and {{tip|heal}} '''Xin Zhao''' for {{as|{{pp|3 to 4|key=%|1;6;11}} of his '''maximum''' health}} {{as|(+ 65% AP)}}.
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
* The stack counter displays 1–3 rather than the usual 0–2, meaning that a count of 1 does not translate to having 1 stack.
* ''{{ais|Wind Becomes Lightning|Xin Zhao}}'' generates one stack per strike that hits at least one enemy.
* Stacks reset when '''Xin Zhao''' {{tip|death|dies}}.
* Stacks of ''Determination'' will be gained even if the attack is {{tip|blocked}}.
* {{Pending for test}}: ''Determination's'' interaction with ''parrying'' effects ({{tip|dodge}}, {{tip|blind}}).
* ''Determination'' deals {{tip|proc damage}}.
** Since it is a separate instance of damage when applied by basic attack or either of {{ais|W|Xin Zhao}} strikes, flat damage reduction that applies to both the main and bonus damage such as {{cais|Tantrum|Amumu}} passive will reduce each, for twice the reduction.
** The bonus damage cannot {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}}.
* When applied by a basic attack:
** The attack uses a unique animation.
** The bonus damage benefits from {{stil|life steal}}.
*** {{pending for test}} It {{tip|applies life steal}} specifically.
** Neither the bonus damage or heal will be blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* When applied by either of {{ais|W|Xin Zhao}} strikes:
** Triggers against the closest target struck by the strike (equals first target to receive spell effects).
** Does not benefit from {{sti|life steal}}, including not healing from ''Wind Becomes Lightning's'' 33% conversion for this bonus damage.
** Since {{tip|proc damage}} is 'single target', {{tip|drain|Vamp}} will heal from 100% of the bonus damage.
** The bonus damage will be blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}, the heal will not.

Q.name: Three Talon Strike
Q.description: Xin Zhao's next 3 standard attacks deal increased damage with the third attack knocking an opponent into the air.
Q.tooltip:
Xin Zhao's next 3 Attacks deal an additional {{ bonusdamage }} physical damage and reduces his other Ability's Cooldowns by 1 second. The third Attack also Knocks Up for {{ e2 }} seconds.
{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xin Zhao}} empowers his next few attacks within a duration to deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} and {{sti|ah|reduce}} his other ability cooldowns.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The last empowered attack will also briefly {{tip|airborne|knock up}} the target.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xin Zhao''' empowers his next three basic attacks {{tip|on-attack}} within 5 seconds to each have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} and reduce his other [[Champion ability|abilities']] {{sti|'''current''' cooldowns}} by 1 second. Each attack refreshes the duration.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Bonus Physical Damage|{{ap|16 to 68}} {{as|(+ 40% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Total Bonus Physical Damage|{{ap|16*3 to 68*3}} {{as|(+ 120% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: The third attack {{tip|airborne|knocks up}} the target for {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Three Talon Strike's'' '''bonus''' damage is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Three Talon Strike {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Xin Zhao's''' basic attack timer.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will only block the knock up.
* The enhanced attacks present input buffering during their wind-up animation ('''Xin Zhao''' cannot be issued any commands until after it ends).

W.name: Wind Becomes Lightning
W.description: Xin Zhao slashes in front of himself with his spear, then thrusts it forward, slowing affected enemies and marking them as Challenged.
W.tooltip:
Xin Zhao slashes, dealing {{ slashdamage }} physical damage, then thrusts, dealing {{ thrustdamage }}. Enemies hit by the thrust are Slowed by {{ e6 }}% for {{ e7 }} seconds. 

Champions and Large Monsters hit by the thrust are marked as Challenged for {{ markduration }} seconds and revealed unless Stealthed.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xin Zhao}} slashes in an arc, then thrusts his spear in a line in the target direction. Each strike deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and heals '''Xin Zhao''' based on his {{stil|life steal}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The thrust deals increased damage based on {{as|{{sti|critical strike chance}}}} and briefly {{tip|slows}} enemies hit, enemy {{tip|champions}} or {{tip|monsters}} hit are also {{tip|standard sight|revealed}} and marked [[File:Xin Zhao Challenged Mark.png|24px|link=]]''Challenged'' for a short time.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Xin Zhao''' slashes in an arc and, after the cast time, thrusts his spear in a line in the target direction. Each strike deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, modified to {{pp|50 to 100 for 16|key=%}} against {{tip|minions}}.

The thrust deals increased damage, further by {{as|{{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=critical strike chance|0 to 33.3 for 11|0 to 100|formula=0.33 * critical strike chance}}|critical chance}}, and {{tip|slows}} enemies hit by 50% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds. Enemy {{tip|champions}} and {{tip|monsters}} hit are also marked [[File:Xin Zhao Challenged Mark.png|24px|link=]]''Challenged'' for 3 seconds, during which they are {{tip|standard sight|revealed}}.
wiki_detail.description2: The durations of ''{{ai|Three Talon Strike|Xin Zhao}}'', ''{{ais|Audacious Charge|Xin Zhao}}'' {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}, and ''{{ai|Crescent Guard|Xin Zhao}}'' are delayed relative to ''Wind Becomes Lightning's'' cast time after {{fd|0.2}} seconds of its activation.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Wind Becomes Lightning's'' damage {{tip|healing|heals}} '''Xin Zhao''' for {{fd|33.{{recurring|3}}}}% of his {{stil|life steal}}.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|275|Slash semi-circle radius}} / {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|125|Slash and thrust extra check radius}}
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1000|Thrust range}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|940|Maximum possible range; See notes}}

E.name: Audacious Charge
E.description: Xin Zhao charges to an enemy, gaining increased Attack Speed and dealing damage to all enemies in the area, slowing them briefly. This Ability gains increased range against Challenged targets.
E.tooltip:
Xin Zhao charges an enemy, dealing {{ chargedamage }} magic damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by {{ baseslowamount }}% for {{ e6 }} seconds.

Xin Zhao also grants himself {{ e3 }}% Attack Speed for {{ e4 }} seconds.

This Ability's range is increased on enemies that are Challenged. 
{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Xin Zhao}} {{tip|dashes}} to the target enemy, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and briefly {{tip|slow|slowing}} them. He then gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Audacious Charge's'' {{sti|range}} is increased against a [[File:Xin Zhao Challenged Mark.png|24px|link=]]''Challenged'' target.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xin Zhao''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target enemy's location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies near them and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 30% for {{fd|0.5}} seconds. ''Audacious Charge's'' range is increased against [[File:Xin Zhao Challenged Mark.png|24px|link=]]''Challenged'' targets.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Xin Zhao''' then gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: ''{{ai|Three Talon Strike|Xin Zhao}} and {{ai|Crescent Guard|Xin Zhao}} can be cast during the dash.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The primary target cannot dodge ''Audacious Charge's'' effects.
** The target will always emit the area of effect from their position.
* If no unit is targeted directly, ''Audacious Charge'' will search for possible targets in a 200 radius around the target location.

R.name: Crescent Guard
R.description: Xin Zhao passively challenges an enemy he damaged recently. When activated, Xin Zhao deals damage to nearby enemies based on their current Health and knocks non-challenged targets back, becoming impervious to damage dealt by champions outside of the circle created.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive - Challenge:}} The last enemy champion hit by {{cis|Xin Zhao}} basic attacks or ''{{ai|Audacious Charge|Xin Zhao}}'' is marked [[File:Xin Zhao Challenged Mark.png|24px|link=]]''Challenged'' for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xin Zhao''' sweeps his spear to deal {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies based on {{as|their '''current''' health}}, this will also briefly {{tip|airborne|knock back}} and {{tip|stun}} those not marked ''Challenged''.
wiki_detail.blurb3: For the next few seconds, '''Xin Zhao''' is {{tip|invulnerability|invulnerable}} against enemy {{tip|champions}} far away from of him.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive - Challenge:}} The last enemy champion hit by '''Xin Zhao's''' basic attacks or ''{{ai|Audacious Charge|Xin Zhao}}'' is marked ''Challenged'' for 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Xin Zhao''' sweeps his spear around him, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies, capped at 600 against {{tip|monsters}}, and {{tip|airborne|knocking back}} all non-''Challenged'' targets hit up-to 700 units over {{fd|0.75}} seconds, as well as {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for the same duration.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|75 to 275}} {{as|(+ 100% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 110% AP)}} {{as|(+ 15% of target's '''current''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: For the next 4 seconds, '''Xin Zhao''' is {{tip|invulnerable}} against enemy {{tip|champions}} far away from him.
wiki_detail.tips: * Enemies will not be marked as ''{{ai|Challenge|Xin Zhao|Challenged}}'' if ''Crescent Guard'' has not been learned. Learning the ability after an enemy would have been marked will still cause them to be {{tip|airborne|knocked back}}.
